sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76053" key="ou)/thsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὔτ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">οὐτάω</etym>) <sense id="n76053.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a wounding</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
